revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[af:Sjabloon:NOR]] [[als:Vorlage:NOR]] [[ar:قالب:NOR]] [[frp:Template:Norvèg·e]] [[az:Şablon:NOR]] [[bn:Template:NOR]] [[ca:Plantilla:NOR]] [[de:Vorlage:NOR]] [[el:Πρότυπο:NOR]] [[es:Plantilla:NOR]] [[eo:Ŝablono:NOR]] [[eu:Txantiloi:NOR]] [[fr:Modèle:Norvège]] [[gl:Template:NOR]] [[ko:틀:NOR]] [[hy:Կաղապար:NOR]] [[hsb:Předłoha:NOR]] [[io:Template:NOR]] [[id:Templat:NOR]] [[is:Snið:NOR]] [[it:Template:NOR]] [[ka:თარგი:NOR]] [[lb:Template:NOR]] [[ml:ഫലകം:NOR]] [[mn:Template:NOR]] [[ja:Template:NOR]] [[nap:Template:NOR]] [[nn:Mal:NOR]] [[oc:Modèl:Norvègia]] [[pt:Predefinição:NOR]] [[ro:Format:NOR]] [[qu:Plantilla:NOR]] [[ru:Шаблон:NOR]] [[simple:Template:NOR]] [[sk:Šablóna:NOR]] [[sl:Predloga:NOR]] [[sv:Mall:NOR]] [[th:แม่แบบ:NOR]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:NOR]] [[uk:Шаблон:NOR]] [[vec:Template:NOR]] [[zh-yue:Template:NOR]] [[zh:Template:NOR]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
